metadata.title: Esplêndido | Professional Cleaning Services in Portugal
metadata.description: Residential, commercial and professional cleaning services. Trained team, eco-friendly products and 100% satisfaction guarantee. Free quote!

hero.subtitle1: A dedicated, trained team at your service.

story.title: Meet Esplêndido
story.subtitle: Our story told step by step

steps.title: Our Commitment
steps.text: We are constantly improving our already high standards so you see us as the best company in the industry.

steps.title: How We Work
steps.text: Our specialty is eliminating the stress of every aspect of cleaning. Get a quote online in 60 seconds.

steps.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
steps.text: We are fully committed to your satisfaction, with an attentive and properly trained team, paying attention to the smallest details.

steps.title: Eco-Friendly Products
steps.text: Biodegradable products that are safe for the environment, pets and people.
highlights: Extensive coverage in Lisboa and Margem Sul

items.name: Maintenance Domestic Cleaning
items.description: Fixed team, professional products and insurance included
details: Includes 1 maintenance cleaning session with a fixed and rigorously trained team, professional cleaning products specific to each surface, high-powered vacuums and accident insurance (up to €50,000).
We use products that hydrate and restore shine to surfaces, ensuring a deep and safe clean.
includes: Dusting furniture and disinfection with products that hydrate and restore shine (exterior)
Cleaning of frames and wall-mounted objects
Mirror cleaning
Vacuuming sofas, rugs and mattresses
Cleaning of fridge, oven, extractor and microwave (exterior)
Full cleaning and disinfection of bathrooms
Vacuuming and washing floors with suitable products
Replacing trash bags
Final ambiance with a neutral and pleasant fragrance

items.name: Deep Cleaning
details: A complete deep cleaning service for those who want an intensive and thorough result throughout the entire space.
Ideal for one-off cleans, seasonal changes or when your space needs a complete refresh.
includes: Vacuuming ceilings and walls
Cleaning frames and decorative objects
Cleaning tiles, doors, lintels, baseboards, switches and sockets
Cleaning window frames, windows, glass and blinds
Dusting furniture (inside and out) and disinfection with products that hydrate and restore shine
Vacuuming sofas, rugs and mattresses
Cleaning fridge, oven, microwave and extractor (inside and out)
Full cleaning and disinfection of bathrooms
Floor vacuuming and application of wash and wax
Cleaning balconies, yards and enclosed terraces
Replacing trash bags
Ambiance with a neutral and pleasant fragrance

items.name: Post-Construction Cleaning
details: An essential service to prepare a newly built or renovated property for use.
We remove construction residue, dust, paint stains, cement and other materials, deeply sanitizing all surfaces.
includes: Debris removal: wood scraps, cement and rubble
Vacuuming and sanitizing floors, walls, ceilings, doors and windows
Cleaning glass, baseboards, outlets and switches
Full sanitizing of kitchens and bathrooms
Sanitizing door handles, handrails and light fixtures
Final quality inspection before handover

items.name: Mold & Moisture Cleaning
items.description: Removing fungi from walls and ceilings
details: Mold and moisture cleaning and treatment service to ensure the health and integrity of your spaces.
We follow a systematic approach with specific anti-mold products and preventive maintenance advice.
includes: Cleaning surfaces with specific anti-mold products (walls, ceilings, baseboards, affected furniture)
Cleaning grout and tiles in bathrooms and kitchens, if necessary
Removal of odors caused by mold and moisture
Maintenance advice to prevent future occurrences of mold and moisture

items.name: Glass, Window & Blind Cleaning
items.description: Interior and exterior cleaning with specialized products
details: An essential service for maintaining the brightness and appearance of any space.
We combine professional techniques with the right products to remove accumulated dust, stains and grime.
includes: Glass cleaning
Cleaning of window frames (wood, aluminium or PVC)
Blind cleaning, ensuring removal of dust and accumulated grime

items.name: Sofa Cleaning
details: An essential service for maintaining a clean and healthy environment, removing dirt, dust mites, odors and stains from upholstery.
We use professional shampoo suited to each fabric type and extraction machines for an impeccable result.
includes: Deep vacuuming: removal of dust, hair and surface particles
Application of professional shampoo suited to each fabric type
Careful manual or mechanical brushing to loosen deep dirt and stains
Shampoo extraction with a machine that removes dirt, leaving the sofa clean and nearly dry

items.name: Mattress Cleaning
details: An essential service for maintaining a healthy sleep environment free of dust mites, bacteria and allergens.
Especially important for people with allergies or respiratory issues.
includes: Deep vacuuming: removes dust, mites and accumulated surface particles
Application of shampoo or sanitizing product specific for mattresses, safe for skin
Light brushing to loosen dirt and stains in the mattress fibers
Product extraction with a machine, ensuring complete sanitization and a healthier environment

items.name: Rug Cleaning
details: A complete deep cleaning process to maintain the cleanliness and durability of your rugs.
We work with professional shampoo suited to each rug type, preserving colors and fibers.
includes: Intensive vacuuming: removes dust, sand and surface particles
Application of professional shampoo suited to the rug type, preserving colors and fibers
Brushing and agitation of the product to penetrate fibers and remove deep dirt
Shampoo extraction with a machine, removing all solution and dirt, leaving the rug clean and nearly dry

items.name: Carpet Cleaning
details: A specialized deep cleaning process for carpets, removing accumulated dirt, dust mites and allergens.
We use professional shampoo and extraction machines to restore the appearance and hygiene of your carpet.
includes: Deep vacuuming: removes dust, threads and embedded particles
Application of professional shampoo or cleaning product that cleans safely without damaging the carpet
Mechanical or manual brushing to loosen the deepest dirt from the fibers
Shampoo extraction with a machine, leaving the carpet clean, sanitized and nearly dry

items.name: Commercial Cleaning
items.description: Professional cleaning for offices and commercial spaces
details: Professional cleaning service for offices, shops and commercial spaces, maintaining a professional and welcoming environment.
We ensure complete cleaning and disinfection of all common areas, bathrooms and workspaces.
includes: Dusting and disinfection of furniture, desks, shelves and common surfaces
Cleaning of frames, decorative objects and fixed equipment (e.g. shelves, cabinets)
Cleaning of mirrors and interior glass
Vacuuming carpets, rugs and upholstery (chairs, waiting room sofas)
Exterior cleaning of kitchen or pantry equipment (fridge, microwave, extractors)
Full cleaning and disinfection of bathrooms and sanitary areas
Vacuuming and washing floors with products suited to the floor type (wood, vinyl, ceramic)
Replacing trash bags and waste management
Final ambiance with a neutral and pleasant fragrance, maintaining a professional and welcoming environment

items.name: Custom Cleaning
details: Every space is unique and every client has specific needs. Our custom service is made to measure.
Contact us to discuss exactly what you need and we'll create an exclusive cleaning plan for you.
includes: On-site space assessment
Personalized cleaning plan
Dedicated team for your project
Flexible scheduling and frequency
Supervision by a dedicated supervisor

steps.title: Request a quote
steps.description: Request your quote in just 1 minute through our chat or WhatsApp.

steps.title: Specialist contact
steps.description: A specialist will get in touch to fully understand your needs and schedule the best day for you.

steps.title: Welcome the team
steps.description: Our trained team arrives on the scheduled date, ready to transform your space.

testimonials.name: Marta Pereira
testimonials.text: They've been cleaning my house for over 6 months and I'm thrilled! The team is always the same, super friendly and careful. I recommend them 100%!

testimonials.name: Manuel Oliveira
testimonials.text: I requested a glass and window cleaning for my apartment and was amazed by the result. Everything was spotless, even the hardest corners!

testimonials.name: João Santos
testimonials.text: I hired Esplêndido for a post-construction cleaning and they exceeded all expectations. The house looked brand new, not a trace of dust. Super professional team.

testimonials.name: Ana Silveira
testimonials.text: I use the weekly cleaning service and it's the best decision I've made. The supervisor called me to check if everything was okay — that kind of attention makes all the difference.

testimonials.name: Ricardo Mendes
testimonials.text: The sofa cleaning was spectacular! I had lost hope of removing those stains, but the team worked miracles. It looks like a new sofa. Thank you so much!

coverage.title: Where we operate
coverage.subtitle: We serve all of Lisboa, Cascais, Almada and Seixal
coverage.notFound: Didn't find your area? Get in touch — we may have coverage in your zone.

finalCta.subtitle: Choose the service, tell us what you need and our trained team will be at your door. No commitment.

footer.description: Professional cleaning services in Lisboa and Margem Sul. Trained team, eco-friendly products and 100% satisfaction guarantee.

about.message1: Esplêndido is a professional cleaning services company in Lisboa and Margem Sul.
about.message2: With over 1000 satisfied clients, we offer a dedicated, trained team, eco-friendly products and 100% satisfaction guarantee.
about.message3: Our mission is to transform spaces with quality, trust and splendid service.

locations.message1: We currently serve the following zones:
locations.message2: 📍 Lisboa Centro — Baixa, Chiado, Avenida, Saldanha, Marquês, Parque das Nações, Benfica, Lumiar, Telheiras, Campo de Ourique
locations.message3: 📍 Margem Sul — Almada, Seixal, Barreiro, Montijo, Setúbal
locations.message4: Would you like to get a quote for your area?

products.message1: We only use professional eco-friendly and biodegradable products, safe for children and pets.
products.message4: 🛋️ Upholstery: Neutral shampoos specific to fabrics
products.message5: All our products are approved and comply with European safety standards.

faq.menuQuestion: What would you like to know about?
faq.guaranteeAnswer: We offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. Our team is trained to always deliver the best results, with full commitment and professionalism.
faq.paymentAnswer: Payment is made after the service is completed. We accept bank transfer and MBWay. For monthly plans, payment is due at the end of the first month.
faq.teamAnswer: Yes! We keep the same team for each client, so they get to know your space and your preferences.
faq.presenceQuestion: Do I need to be home?
faq.presenceAnswer: Not required. Many clients hand over the key to our trusted team. All professionals are verified and insured.
faq.priceQuestion: I'd like to know the price
faq.priceAnswer: For a personalized quote, get in touch via WhatsApp!
faq.whatsappMessage: Hello, I'd like to know the price of your services.

servicesInfo.menuQuestion: Which service would you like to know more about?

wizard.whatsappGreeting: Hello! I'd like to request a quote:
wizard.closing: Looking forward to hearing from you. Thank you!

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.subtitle: Meet Esplêndido
aboutUs.description: Esplêndido was born with the goal of offering excellent cleaning services in Portugal. With a dedicated and trained team, we seek to transform every space with attention to detail, quality products and a genuine commitment to our clients' satisfaction.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.deepDescription: Ideal for homes or businesses that need a complete sanitisation.
pricing.recurringDescription: Keep your space always spotless with trusted professionals.

thankYou.title: Quote Sent!
thankYou.message: Thank you for your request! Our team will review it and get back to you within 24 hours. Please check your phone or email.
